name: PocketBase relation expand behavior
pocketBaseNote: PocketBase expands relation fields on list, view, create, update, and auth responses while respecting target collection view rules.

cases.name: list expands single nested relation
cases.pocketBaseNote: A single relation can be expanded and then expanded again through a nested relation path.

cases.name: list expands multi relation in stored order
cases.pocketBaseNote: Multi relation expand results should follow the stored relation id order.

cases.name: record expand includes collection metadata
cases.pocketBaseNote: Expanded records include PocketBase-style collectionName metadata unless response fields projection removes it.

cases.name: projected expand keeps only requested fields
cases.pocketBaseNote: PocketBase response fields can project nested expand payloads without returning the full related record.

cases.name: blocked relation expand is omitted
cases.pocketBaseNote: A related record blocked by the target collection view rule is omitted from the expand payload.
